name: logic_di_duong_cong
content:
# giảm tốc khi di chuyển theo hình cung
diem_dau_diem_dich = [["C1", "H14"], ["C1", "H04"], ["H14", "C1"], ["H04", "C1"],
                   ["C2", "H110"], ["C2", "H010"], ["H110", "C2"], ["H010", "C2"]]

toc_do_tien = 3000
for i in range(0, len(diem_dau_diem_dich)):
    # print(vi_tri_hien_tai, diem_dau_diem_dich[i][0], vi_tri_tiep_theo, diem_dau_diem_dich[i][1])
    if diem_vua_di_qua == diem_dau_diem_dich[i][0] and diem_tiep_theo == diem_dau_diem_dich[i][1]:
        set_toc_do_tien(toc_do_tien)
        break
